harness_preflight.output:
usage: dflash_correctness_harness.py [-h] [--config CONFIG] [--profile PROFILE] [--phase {production,overlap_eager,sync_eager}] [--tier {quick,full}] [--target-url TARGET_URL]
                                     [--dflash-url DFLASH_URL] [--results RESULTS] [--suites SUITES] [--sampling-count SAMPLING_COUNT] [--permutations PERMUTATIONS]
                                     [--request-timeout REQUEST_TIMEOUT] [--resume] [--overwrite]

Strict HTTP differential harness for target-only and DFlash SGLang servers. The executable harness uses SGLang's native /generate endpoint. Greedy cases pass only when generated token IDs and
raw finish reasons are identical. Pure helpers in this module are unit-tested without loading either 32B model.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --config CONFIG
  --profile PROFILE
  --phase {production,overlap_eager,sync_eager}
  --tier {quick,full}
  --target-url TARGET_URL
  --dflash-url DFLASH_URL
  --results RESULTS
  --suites SUITES
  --sampling-count SAMPLING_COUNT
  --permutations PERMUTATIONS
  --request-timeout REQUEST_TIMEOUT
  --resume
  --overwrite

profile_description: H200-safe, checkpoint-matched fix4 profile: GPTQ W4A16/Marlin target plus compressed-tensors int4-MLP DFlash draft. This is not the Blackwell-only Humming W4A8 arithmetic path.

finish_replay.marker: # DFLASH_FINISH_REPLAY_FIX: replay stock checks one token at a time.

finish_kv_hardened.marker: # DFLASH_FINISH_KV_HARDENED: never decommit outside this verify chunk.

sampling_guard.marker: # DFLASH_SAMPLING_GUARD: reject transforms this verifier cannot preserve.

sampling_open_interval.marker: # DFLASH_SAMPLING_OPEN_INTERVAL: zero mass must never be accepted.

stateless_seed.marker: # DFLASH_STATELESS_SEED: key verifier coins by request seed and position.
